description_long: This is a wooden baseball bat with a natural brown finish, featuring a cylindrical handle that tapers into a thicker barrel. The barrel is embedded with several large, dark metal spikes protruding outward, giving it a menacing, weaponized appearance. The wood grain is visible along the length of the bat, and there are areas with darker stains, possibly resembling dried blood or heavy use. The handle is smooth and lacks any grip tape or additional wrapping. The end of the bat is rounded and unadorned, with no visible end cap or manufacturer markings. The overall look is rugged and intimidating, suitable for both sports and as a prop in urban or post-apocalyptic scenarios.
description: A wooden baseball bat with a natural finish, heavily modified with large metal spikes embedded in the barrel and visible wood grain throughout.
description_view_0: The bat is seen from the handle end, showing the rounded knob and a direct view of the spikes protruding from the barrel.
description_view_1: A side profile reveals the full length of the bat, the smooth handle, and the cluster of metal spikes embedded in the barrel.
description_view_2: Viewed from the barrel end, the spikes are prominent, radiating outward, and the handle appears narrow and smooth.
description_view_3: Another side profile, similar to view 1, showing the opposite side of the bat and the arrangement of spikes on the barrel.
